name: Experience Capture

quote.role: Primary visual element — the overheard dialogue line. Serif signals recorded speech.

headline.role: Slide headline — factual, direct, journalistic. Never competes with the quote.

image_prompt_template: First-person POV photograph from {pov}, {motion_instruction}, {light_quality}, cinematic color grade — crushed blacks with color retained only in practical light sources, {human_presence}, deep {bg} environmental darkness, heavy vignette darkening all edges to near-black, authentic documentary photography register — not aspirational brand photography, anonymous perspective with no identifiable faces visible

cover_hook.name: Cover Hook
cover_hook.description: The defining first-person moment — the scene every reader has lived through
cover_hook.notes: Full-bleed photograph fills entire canvas. Quote in Lora 700 at 88px sits upper-left — it IS the hero element, above the photograph's content. Headline in DM Sans 600 below at lower-left. Bottom gradient overlay ensures text legibility. The photograph breathes behind both.

context_setter.name: Context Setter
context_setter.description: Establishing the world — a wider scene that shows the environment
context_setter.notes: No quote on this slide — headline only. The photograph establishes the experiential world. Top gradient overlay for text legibility. This slide is visual exposition.

problem_setup.name: Problem Setup
problem_setup.description: The friction moment — the beat where things go wrong
problem_setup.notes: Quote captures the internal monologue or overheard frustration of this moment. Photograph shows the friction environment — error screen, waiting state, failed transaction moment. State: declined or waiting.

problem_escalation.name: Problem Escalation
problem_escalation.description: The worst beat — maximum friction, the moment someone almost gives up
problem_escalation.notes: Right half of canvas is the scene photograph. Left half is deep dark canvas with quote and headline. The dark zone and the scene exist in tension — the darkness is what the reader is feeling, the photo is what they're looking at.

turning_point.name: Turning Point
turning_point.description: The moment the experience shifts — light quality changes, the scene opens up
turning_point.notes: The photograph has visibly different light quality from problem slides — warmer, more open, motion blur replaced by sharpness. The scene is the same environment but transformed. State: flowing or discovering.

pivot_question.name: Pivot Question
pivot_question.description: Pure quote slide — massive single line on near-black canvas
pivot_question.notes: No photograph. The quote exists alone on the dark canvas at 112px Lora 700 — the largest type in the carousel. A single rhetorical question the reader has asked themselves. The darkness is not a failure of imagery — it IS the image. One line only. No body text.

solution_introduction.name: Solution Introduction
solution_introduction.description: The better version of the same experience — same scene, different quality
solution_introduction.notes: Quote moves to lower position — the headline reads first, then the quote confirms. The photograph should feel lighter, faster, more resolved than problem slides. State: seamless or flowing. Same POV as cover — the journey has come full circle.

landscape_overview.name: Landscape Overview
landscape_overview.description: Scene mosaic — three adjacent moments from the same journey
landscape_overview.notes: Upper portion: headline text. Lower portion: three equally-sized photograph panels side by side, each showing a different scene from the same experiential domain. Each panel has a tiny caption label below. No quote — the visual comparison does the work.

technical_foundation.name: Technical Foundation
technical_foundation.description: Behind-the-scenes — the moment the user never sees but always feels
technical_foundation.notes: The photograph shows what the user never sees — a server room, a network operations center, a data center floor — but captured in the same first-person POV documentary style. The quote voices what the user feels when this infrastructure works (or fails) invisibly.

how_it_works_setup.name: How It Works (Setup)
how_it_works_setup.description: The before-moment — the experience just before the transaction begins
how_it_works_setup.notes: The anticipation moment — hand reaching toward terminal, phone approaching reader, checkout screen loading. Motion blur optional. State: handshaking.

how_it_works_flow.name: How It Works (Flow)
how_it_works_flow.description: The transaction in motion — the 0.8 seconds where everything happens
how_it_works_flow.notes: Motion blur mandatory. The fastest moment in the experience. Light streaking. State: completing. The blur IS the story.

how_it_works_security.name: How It Works (Security)
how_it_works_security.description: The approval moment — when the system says yes
how_it_works_security.notes: The resolution moment — the green checkmark glow, the approved LED, the confirmation screen illuminating the scene. Practical light from the success indicator. State: approved or confirmed.

company_positioning.name: Company Positioning
company_positioning.description: The best version of the experience — peak moment, everything working
company_positioning.notes: The aspirational version of the core experience — same POV, best possible light, best possible outcome. Quote is a positive version of the overheard dialogue. Logo appears. State: arriving or seamless.

cta_close.name: CTA Close
cta_close.description: Post-experience silence — the feeling after it all works
cta_close.notes: No photograph. A single closing line — the feeling after a perfect transaction — in Lora 700 at 96px. Then the brand name. Then the invitation. Three beats. Silence between each.

objects.name: first-person view looking down at a payment terminal on a shop counter, hand hovering above NFC reader, store interior blurred behind
objects.material: ambient retail lighting, NFC ring LED glow, warm shop light
objects.dialogue: Just tap. Why isn't it working.
objects.pov: customer POV looking down at counter-mounted payment terminal
objects.light_quality: mixed warm retail ambient and cool NFC LED ring glow

objects.name: first-person view of a phone screen showing checkout page, thumb hovering over Pay button, coffee shop background visible beyond phone
objects.material: screen glow illuminating thumb, warm coffee shop ambient beyond
objects.dialogue: Okay it's loading. It's still loading.
objects.pov: customer POV looking at own phone screen
objects.light_quality: OLED screen glow as primary light source, soft warm ambient

objects.name: first-person view of a contactless card mid-tap over terminal, card moving downward into frame, terminal LED shifting from amber to green
objects.material: LED status light transitioning, matte card surface catching counter light
objects.dialogue: That actually worked first try.
objects.pov: customer POV looking down at payment action
objects.light_quality: terminal LED as accent, overhead retail lighting

objects.name: wide first-person shot looking ahead in a queue, other customers ahead at terminals, backs turned, soft queue barrier ropes in foreground
objects.material: harsh ceiling fluorescent, queue shadows, ambient retail light
objects.dialogue: Three people. I'm just buying one thing.
objects.pov: customer POV standing in checkout queue
objects.light_quality: ceiling fluorescent, flat and neutral

objects.name: over-shoulder view of a cashier's hands processing a return, screen showing transaction details, customer's hands resting on counter in foreground
objects.material: screen backlight, counter-level fluorescent, register light
objects.dialogue: Do you have your original receipt?
objects.pov: customer POV at counter, looking at cashier's screen and hands
objects.light_quality: POS screen backlight as key source, overhead fluorescent

objects.name: first-person view of a phone screen showing TRANSACTION DECLINED in red, thumb hovering, background dark
objects.material: red error screen glow as sole light source, dark environment
objects.dialogue: Why does it keep declining. The money is there.
objects.pov: customer POV staring at phone screen showing decline
objects.light_quality: error screen red glow only — no ambient light

objects.name: first-person view of OTP input screen, six empty boxes waiting, soft timer countdown visible, hand not yet typing
objects.material: phone screen white glow, dark room beyond
objects.dialogue: Where's the OTP. I've been waiting two minutes.
objects.pov: customer POV looking at OTP entry screen
objects.light_quality: bright white screen glow, surrounding darkness

objects.name: first-person view looking at a laptop with payment page showing spinning loader, credit card resting on keyboard beside, person's sleeve visible
objects.material: laptop screen glow, desk lamp warm accent, credit card glinting
objects.dialogue: It's been on this screen for three minutes now.
objects.pov: customer POV at desk, laptop in foreground
objects.light_quality: laptop screen glow primary, warm desk lamp secondary

objects.name: first-person view of a phone showing SMS OTP message that has expired, timestamp visible showing 10 minutes ago
objects.material: phone screen light, slight ambient from nearby window
objects.dialogue: It says the code has expired. I just got it.
objects.pov: customer POV looking at SMS message on phone
objects.light_quality: phone screen as sole source, soft window light ambient

objects.name: first-person view of a checkout page with error banner reading PAYMENT FAILED TRY AGAIN, order summary still visible below, cursor on retry button
objects.material: monitor screen glow, office ambient light
objects.dialogue: Third time. Do I try a different card.
objects.pov: customer POV at desktop browser, checkout error state
objects.light_quality: monitor screen glow, cool office fluorescent ambient

objects.name: first-person view of a phone being held with both hands in portrait, product listing open on screen, buy now button visible at bottom
objects.material: screen glow from below, natural daylight from window behind
objects.dialogue: Okay just press buy. Don't overthink it.
objects.pov: customer POV looking down at phone held in both hands
objects.light_quality: natural daylight from window, screen glow counter-light from below

objects.name: first-person close view of a phone screen showing QR code scanner active, blurred QR code merchant stand in background coming into focus
objects.material: phone screen scanner UI glow, merchant stall ambient lighting
objects.dialogue: Hold it still. Hold it still.
objects.pov: customer POV using phone camera to scan QR code
objects.light_quality: mixed phone screen light and merchant ambient

objects.name: first-person view looking at phone showing digital wallet payment confirmation, faint green checkmark illuminating scene, street visible in blurred background
objects.material: success screen green glow as primary light, street ambient in background
objects.dialogue: Done. That was actually fast.
objects.pov: customer POV looking at payment success screen
objects.light_quality: success green screen glow, blurred outdoor ambient

objects.name: first-person view of a phone showing cart with items, checkout button at bottom, one hand holding phone and other hand's thumb approaching the screen
objects.material: screen glow, indoor ambient, slight shadow from hovering thumb
objects.dialogue: Is this the right address. Let me check again.
objects.pov: customer POV in pre-checkout review moment
objects.light_quality: screen glow primary, indoor room light ambient

objects.name: first-person night view of a phone screen showing food delivery payment page, street lights streaking behind, motion of walking visible in blur
objects.material: phone screen glow, streaking street lights, night ambient
objects.dialogue: I'll just pay when I get home.
objects.pov: customer POV walking at night, looking at phone
objects.light_quality: phone screen glow, streaking city lights, night

objects.name: first-person view looking down at a phone with fingerprint scanner prompt, thumb resting on sensor, subtle glow from below screen
objects.material: under-display sensor glow, ambient room light
objects.dialogue: It never works on the first try when I'm in a hurry.
objects.pov: customer POV looking at own thumb on phone fingerprint sensor
objects.light_quality: under-display glow as accent, soft room ambient

objects.name: first-person forward view of a face recognition camera on a laptop, face partially reflected in screen, loading indicator visible
objects.material: infrared camera glow subtle, laptop screen reflection of face
objects.dialogue: Am I in the right light for this.
objects.pov: customer POV looking directly at face authentication camera
objects.light_quality: screen ambient, window backlight, IR camera subtle glow

objects.name: first-person view of phone screen showing APPROVED in green with checkmark, slight screen glow illuminating palm holding phone, dark background
objects.material: success green screen glow sole light source, dark room
objects.dialogue: First time. Didn't even feel it.
objects.pov: customer POV receiving authentication approval
objects.light_quality: success green screen glow only — dramatic chiaroscuro

objects.name: first-person view of a phone showing wrong fingerprint error, red tinge on screen, same thumb still resting on sensor
objects.material: error red screen glow, frustrated dark environment
objects.dialogue: I'm using the same finger. The same one it learned.
objects.pov: customer POV at failed fingerprint authentication
objects.light_quality: error red screen glow as sole light, surrounding darkness

objects.name: first-person view of a phone notification asking to confirm payment from another device, yes/deny buttons visible, second device (laptop) blurred in background
objects.material: phone screen glow, blurred laptop screen ambient in background
objects.dialogue: Which device does it want me to approve from.
objects.pov: customer POV managing two-device authentication
objects.light_quality: two screens creating competing light sources

objects.name: first-person view of a contactless payment being completed — card already withdrawn, terminal showing approved, green LED visible, transaction done
objects.material: terminal green LED, ambient store light, motion suggestion in card withdrawal
objects.dialogue: Oh that was it. That was the whole thing.
objects.pov: customer POV just after completing contactless payment
objects.light_quality: terminal approval LED green, warm store ambient

objects.name: first-person view of a phone with payment success notification arriving before the customer has even pocketed the phone — merchant terminal visible still showing processing
objects.material: phone notification light, merchant terminal amber, gap between them
objects.dialogue: I got the confirmation before the machine beeped.
objects.pov: customer POV looking at own phone with terminal visible
objects.light_quality: dual: phone screen and terminal screen, warm ambient

objects.name: motion-blur first-person view of a phone being pulled from pocket, payment app loading mid-motion, background streaking
objects.material: phone screen light, streaking background, pocket fabric edge
objects.dialogue: Hold on, I'll just—done.
objects.pov: customer POV in motion, pulling phone from pocket
objects.light_quality: phone screen glow, streaked ambient background

objects.name: first-person view of a wearable on a wrist held up to a reader, reader LEDs turning green, rest of scene dark
objects.material: reader green LED ring, watch face ambient glow, dark surrounding
objects.dialogue: I didn't even take my hands out of my pockets. Just the watch.
objects.pov: customer POV looking at wrist held up to NFC reader
objects.light_quality: reader LED as primary light, watch glow secondary, darkness surrounding

objects.name: first-person view of a shopping bag being picked up off a counter, receipt printing in background still, payment clearly already done
objects.material: warm store ambient, receipt printer light, shopping bag texture
objects.dialogue: Already done. I like that.
objects.pov: customer POV collecting purchase, looking at scene
objects.light_quality: warm retail ambient, background printer light

objects.name: first-person merchant POV looking at a tablet showing payment dashboard, today's transaction total prominent, warm shop background blurred
objects.material: tablet screen glow, warm shop ambient, hands visible at edge holding tablet
objects.dialogue: Let me just check if it cleared.
objects.pov: merchant POV looking at payments dashboard on tablet
objects.light_quality: tablet screen glow primary, warm ambient shop light

objects.name: first-person merchant POV looking at terminal showing PAYMENT RECEIVED confirmation, shop counter in foreground, customer's retreating back just visible behind
objects.material: terminal screen glow, counter-level ambient, customer silhouette
objects.dialogue: Good. It went through.
objects.pov: merchant POV looking at owned terminal confirmation
objects.light_quality: terminal screen glow, overhead retail ambient

objects.name: merchant POV looking at a laptop showing payment settings or integration page — late night, desk lamp only, half-drunk coffee cup visible at edge
objects.material: desk lamp warm pool, laptop screen glow, coffee cup edge
objects.dialogue: Why does the documentation look like it was written for someone else.
objects.pov: merchant POV at desk late at night during setup/integration
objects.light_quality: desk lamp warm accent, laptop screen cool, night darkness beyond

objects.name: first-person merchant POV looking at phone showing payout notification with amount — face-down phone being picked up, morning light
objects.material: morning window light, phone screen notification glow, table surface
objects.dialogue: Settlement's in. Earlier than I expected.
objects.pov: merchant POV picking up phone to check morning settlement notification
objects.light_quality: morning window light primary, phone screen ambient

objects.name: first-person merchant POV looking down at hands setting up new payment terminal on counter, instruction sheet visible beside, new terminal still in plastic partially
objects.material: counter-level light, instruction sheet white, terminal packaging
objects.dialogue: Okay this should just plug in and work right.
objects.pov: merchant POV unboxing and setting up new terminal
objects.light_quality: overhead shop ambient, white instruction sheet reflected light

objects.name: first-person view looking at a payment terminal in a foreign country — screen in unfamiliar language, own card in hand, unfamiliar currency amount displayed
objects.material: foreign terminal screen, unfamiliar ambient of overseas setting
objects.dialogue: Is that the right amount. I can't tell.
objects.pov: traveller POV at foreign checkout terminal
objects.light_quality: foreign terminal screen, local ambient lighting

objects.name: first-person view of a phone showing international transfer in progress, recipient country flag visible, amount in two currencies, progress bar loading
objects.material: phone screen glow in semi-dark environment, nighttime ambient
objects.dialogue: How long does this actually take.
objects.pov: sender POV watching international transfer loading
objects.light_quality: phone screen glow sole light, night ambient

objects.name: first-person view of a payment declined screen at a foreign terminal, home bank number visible on screen prompt, other customers forming queue behind
objects.material: terminal error screen red/amber, queue ambient light behind
objects.dialogue: My bank blocked it. I'm standing in the airport.
objects.pov: traveller POV at foreign terminal, declined transaction
objects.light_quality: terminal error glow, airport ambient harsh overhead

objects.name: first-person view of a phone showing multi-currency wallet with amounts in three currencies, transfer button prominent, calm ambient at home
objects.material: phone screen glow, warm home ambient in background
objects.dialogue: I keep three currencies in here now. It's just easier.
objects.pov: experienced user POV managing multi-currency wallet
objects.light_quality: phone screen glow, comfortable warm home ambient

objects.name: first-person view of a laptop with cross-border payment dashboard showing corridor analytics, multiple country flags, settlement timelines, nighttime office
objects.material: laptop screen glow, dark office ambient, city lights through window
objects.dialogue: The India-UAE corridor settled in four seconds. I had to check it twice.
objects.pov: operator POV reviewing cross-border payment analytics
objects.light_quality: laptop screen as primary, city lights through window as accent

objects.name: first-person view looking along a data center corridor — server racks on both sides, blinking LEDs in blue and green, cold air visible in slight haze, perspective vanishing point ahead
objects.material: server LED blue and green ambient, cold air haze, steel rack reflections
objects.dialogue: This is what four-second settlement looks like from the inside.
objects.pov: engineer POV walking a data center aisle
objects.light_quality: server LED arrays — blue, green, amber in patterns, no overhead lighting

objects.name: first-person view of a network operations center — screens on wall showing maps and traffic flows, one engineer in silhouette at desk in foreground
objects.material: NOC screen wall ambient, blue map glow, engineer silhouette
objects.dialogue: Everything's green. It's a good morning.
objects.pov: engineer POV entering the NOC, desk in mid-ground
objects.light_quality: NOC screen wall as sole light source, deep blue ambient

objects.name: extreme close first-person view of a network cable being plugged into a server port, LED immediately illuminating on insertion, hands visible at edge
objects.material: port LED instant glow on insertion, server chassis metallic surface
objects.dialogue: The moment it connects. Zero downtime.
objects.pov: engineer POV inserting network cable, macro view
objects.light_quality: port LED as sole light — sudden point source activation

objects.name: first-person view of a laptop terminal showing real-time API logs streaming — green text on dark background, timestamps in milliseconds
objects.material: terminal green-on-black screen glow, dark surrounding
objects.dialogue: Forty-two milliseconds. Average. On a busy Friday.
objects.pov: engineer POV monitoring live API logs
objects.light_quality: terminal screen green glow only, complete surrounding darkness

objects.name: first-person view of an on-call phone lighting up at 3am on a bedside table — screen showing INCIDENT ALERT, room dark, slight sleep disruption visible in scene
objects.material: phone alert screen red-amber glow, complete bedroom darkness, bedside table edge
objects.dialogue: The system caught it before the first customer noticed.
objects.pov: on-call engineer POV waking to incident alert
objects.light_quality: alert screen glow only — red-amber in complete darkness
